FROM

WHERE   SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND   SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY   QTC_CP_CUST_TRX_DIST_IFACE.VT_INTERFACE_ID ORDER BY   REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
